options.name: --solution
options.description:
(Default: .) Specifies the directory to search for .sln
files, If this option is provided the project file
location option will be ignored.

options.name: --project
options.description: Specifies the directory to search for .csproj files.

options.name: --keep-attrs
options.description:
(Default: false) Keeps the 'Version' attribute in the
.csproj files.

options.name: --no-backup
options.description: (Default: false) Disables the default backup option

options.name: --backup-dir
options.description:
(Default: .) The backup directory for .csproj files about
to be changed.

options.name: --add-gitignore
options.description:
(Default: false) Adds the backup directory to .gitignore
file. Creates one if not present

options.name: --gitignore-dir
options.description:
(Default: .) The directory for .gitignore file if there
isn't one existing.
